title: Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar
tagline: Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar — spiritual town of Karnataka

heroImage.alt: Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar, Karnataka

overview.short: The Sacred Heart of Jesus, Church is a historic Roman Catholic Church situated at Madanthyar near Belthangady.
overview.description: The Sacred Heart of Jesus, Church is a historic Roman Catholic Church situated at Madanthyar near Belthangady. The church was built on 29 January 1893. This church comes under Deanery of Belthangady, Roman Catholic Diocese of Mangalore. This church is dedicated to Sacred Heart of Jesus.

topPlaces.name: Madanthyar
topPlaces.description: Madanthyar is a small town located in Belthangady taluk of the Dakshina Kannada district of Karnataka state in India. It is on the route to Mangalore from Belthangady.

topPlaces.name: Punjalkatte
topPlaces.description: Punjalkatte is a village in Beltangady taluk of Dakshina Kannada district of Karnataka in India. Some parts of this small town is in Bantwal taluk.

topPlaces.name: Naravi
topPlaces.description: Naravi is a panchayat village in Belthangady taluk, Dakshina Kannada, in the foothills of the Western Ghats of India. There are two villages in the Naravi gram panchayat: Naravi and Kuthluru.

topPlaces.name: Neriya
topPlaces.description: Neriya is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Beltangadi taluk of Dakshina Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Laila, Dakshina Kannada
topPlaces.description: Laila is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Beltangadi taluk of Dakshina Kannada district.

topPlaces.name: Kuvettu
topPlaces.description: Kuvettu is a census town in the southern state of Karnataka, India. Administratively it is under Beltangadi taluk of Dakshina Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Ilanthila
topPlaces.description: Ilanthila is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Beltangadi taluk of Dakshina Kannada district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (33 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (39 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar?
faq.a: Stays in Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Church Of Sacred Heart Of Jesus, Madanthyar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Madanthyar, Punjalkatte, Naravi, Neriya, Laila, Dakshina Kannada.
